FontSource.Name: Font Source
FontSource.Hint: Where to load the title font from.

GoogleFontFamily.Name: Google Font Family
GoogleFontFamily.Hint: Font family name as it appears on Google Fonts (e.g. 'Oswald', 'Alfa Slab One'). The module requests the boldest available weight automatically.

FoundryFontFamily.Name: Foundry Font Family
FoundryFontFamily.Hint: Exact font family name as configured in Foundry's Font Management settings.

SoundPath.Name: Impact Sound
SoundPath.Hint: Path to the audio file played when the title card appears. Leave empty for no sound.

DisplayDuration.Name: Display Duration (ms)
DisplayDuration.Hint: How long the title card is shown, in milliseconds.

BackgroundColor.Name: Background Color
BackgroundColor.Hint: Hex color code for the card background (e.g. #1db0f6).

BackgroundTexture.Name: Background Texture
BackgroundTexture.Hint: Image path overlaid on the background color for a grungy look. Leave empty to disable. The bundled default is modules/title-card-uwu/textures/grunge.webp.

TextureOpacity.Name: Texture Opacity (%)
TextureOpacity.Hint: How strongly the background texture shows through (0 = invisible, 100 = full).

TextColor.Name: Text Color
TextColor.Hint: Hex color code for all title card text (e.g. #f5e642).

ZoomAmount.Name: Zoom Amount (%)
ZoomAmount.Hint: How far the card zooms in while displayed. The zoom starts fast and asymptotically slows. 0 disables zoom.

VariantManager.Name: Variant Progression
VariantManager.Label: Manage Variants
VariantManager.Hint: Advance, reset, or set the current variant in the progression sequence.

Dialog.Title: Title
Dialog.Subtitle1Placeholder: BASED ON THE COMIC BOOK BY
Dialog.Subtitle2Placeholder: Robert Kirkman, Cory Walker, & Ryan Ottley
Dialog.MacroCopied: Hardcoded macro copied to clipboard. Paste it into a new Foundry macro.
Dialog.MacroCopyFailed: Could not copy to clipboard. Open the browser console to retrieve the macro.

Notifications.GMOnly: Only the GM can show a title card.

Errors.GMOnly: Only the GM can trigger the Title Card Uwu.
